name: Mention Popup
description: @mention autocomplete for collaborators. Triggered by @ character with type-ahead filtering and keyboard navigation.

standard.description: List with avatars, names, and online status

slots.recent: Recently mentioned users for quick access

visual_brief: Small floating dropdown that appears at the cursor position when '@' is typed. Contains a type-ahead search input (auto-focused, filtering as the user types), an optional 'Recent' section showing recently mentioned users, and a filtered results list. Each user row shows a small avatar, display name, and username or email in muted text. The currently highlighted item has a subtle background tint. The popup has a border, shadow, and rounded corners. Compact preset uses smaller avatars and tighter row spacing.

responsive.mobile: Popup renders as a bottom sheet anchored to the keyboard. Full-width list items with larger touch targets. Avatars at 32px.
responsive.tablet: Floating popup near cursor. Standard row sizing.
responsive.desktop: Compact floating popup near cursor. Keyboard navigation with up/down arrows. Small avatars at 24px.
